# GEMBA Industrial Services

> GEMBA Industrial Services is the industrial division of GEMBA Team EOOD (EIK: 208656371), based in Varna, Bulgaria. We provide certified reactor technician crews and catalyst changeout services to petroleum refineries across Europe.

## Services
- Reactor technician deployment (BA/N2 certified)
- Full catalyst changeout operations (unloading, screening, sock-loading, dense-loading)
- Safety & HSE compliance management
- Specialist personnel supply (4-12 crew members)
- Refinery turnaround supervision

## Track Record
Our crews have worked at: Shell (Rotterdam, Cologne), ExxonMobil (Fawley), BP (Rotterdam), ORLEN Lietuva, Neste (Porvoo), Rompetrol Petromidia, Bazan Group, OMV Schwechat, Bayernoil, Huntsman Holland, Tata Steel IJmuiden.

## Certifications
SCC/VCA (TÜV Rheinland), BA/N2 inert entry, Confined Space Entry, Rigging, Forklift, Crane Operation. Official reference letters from Mourik.
